header_subnote: All one hour long photography sessions include 10 edited images of your choosing and include free travel within 30 minutes of the photographer's location.

addons.title: Printed Images
addons.body:
Meredith Lewis Photography does not offer printed images at this time. 

All photos will be delivered digitally, or via flash drive for a $40 service fee.

addons.title: Additional Digital Images
addons.body:
Additional digital image cost is as follows. (All one hour sessions will contain at least 30 edited images)

One digital image of choice: $25. Rest of gallery: $100.

addons.title: Events
addons.body: All edited images are included in the event package at the rate of 40 edited digital images per hour.

header_intro:
Below is a detailed list of photographic services offered by Meredith Lewis Photography. 

Don't see something you're interested in? Send me an email at Meredith.lewis2018@gmail.com.
addons_bg_alt: An alpine tarn reflecting the sky among the rocks of the White Mountains.

services.name: Senior Portraits
services.alt: A high school senior in a white dress sitting in a sunlit field of wildflowers.
services.description:
A senior portrait session includes one hour of coverage at one location and ten edited images. I'd love to get to know your senior, and to make their photos uniquely them! 

(30 minute senior sessions are available at the cost of $175 and include 5 edited images.)

services.name: Couples
services.alt: A couple embracing in front of a weathered grey barn.
services.description: A couples session includes one hour of coverage at one location between two people.

services.name: Engagement
services.alt: A close up of an engaged couple's hands showing the engagement ring.
services.description: An engagement session includes one hour of coverage at one location between two people and ten edited images. There is nothing more I'd rather do than capture this special time in your life as you begin the rest of your lives together! Congratulations on our engagement!

services.name: Family
services.alt: A family of four with two young children together outdoors in the mountains.
services.description: A family session includes one hour of shooting time for up to four people at one location and ten edited images. Each additional person added to the photoshoot is an additional $25.

services.name: Maternity
services.alt: An expecting couple holding an ultrasound photo in a field.
services.description: A maternity session includes one hour of coverage at one location and ten edited images. This session includes up to four people, and additional persons can be added at $25 per person.

services.name: Pet Photography
services.alt: A woman kissing her small dog outdoors.
services.description: A pet photography includes one hour of coverage at one location and ten edited images. This shoot includes two people and your pup (up to two). Additional people may be added at $25 per person.

services.name: Events & Parties
services.alt: An elegant event table setup with floral arrangements and greenery.
services.description: Events include two hours of coverage at one location and ten edited images. Whether it's a birthday party, bridal shower, sporting event, or even an anniversary, I'd love to photograph it! Additional hours of event coverage may also be added to your day at $50 per hour (This does not apply to weddings.)

services.name: Seasonal Mini Sessions
services.alt: A mother and young son sitting together in a field of purple lupine flowers.
services.description: Fifteen minute mini sessions are offered seasonally throughout the year. A no pressure, Pay What You Can way to have your story captured, no matter the budget. Tap to see what seasonal sessions are currently being offered!
